violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in chest cooler #4 (on service line). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The doors to the outside, located to the left and to the right of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The dishwasher is not in good repair and is not currently being used. Paper products are used for service. Serving utensils are sent to Riverside Middle School (commissary) to wash, rinse, and sanitize. New dishwasher is expected to be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The doors to the outside, located to the left and right of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Doors to the outside must be tight-fitting to prevent the entrance of pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
Dishwasher is in poor repair. Utensils and food service items are sent to Riverside Middle School to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. Test strips must be obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The doors to the outside, located to the left and right of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must have an employee certified in food safety management. This employee must register as a certified food safety manager with the RI department of health. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The doors to the outside, located on the left and right of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment must repair doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service call placed. Paper products to be used and equipment sent to Riverside Middle School to sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The doors to the outside, located on either side of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
Refrigerator door gasket of cooler #9 (milk lift-up cold hold #1) observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The door2 to the outside, located on each side of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
Refrigerator door gasket of milk cold hold #3 observed in poor repair. Gasket must be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sink sanitizing solution. The facility is also lacking thermolabels or high temperature testing device for the dishwasher. Proper test strips for sanitizing must be obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The floor under the dishwasher is constructed of concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The doors to the outside, located on either side of the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom and between the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
Refrigerator door gasket of the lift-up cold hold in the kitchen observed in poor repair. Gasket is to be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023

The dishwasher located in the kitchen remains in poor repair. Dishwasher is only able to wash and rinse. All food equipment/utensils are returned to Riverside Middle School to be sanitized. Dishwasher must be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quarternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the sink. Test strips must be provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023

The floor under the dishwasher is constructed of concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
